recipes.name: Classic Pancakes
recipes.ingredients:
2 cups flour
2 tbsp sugar
2 tsp baking powder
1/2 tsp salt
2 eggs
1 1/2 cups milk
2 tbsp melted butter
recipes.instructions:
Mix dry ingredients in a bowl.
Whisk wet ingredients separately.
Combine and stir until just mixed.
Cook on greased griddle over medium heat until bubbles form, then flip.

recipes.name: Grandma's Chili
recipes.ingredients:
1 lb ground beef
1 can kidney beans
1 can diced tomatoes
1 onion, chopped
2 cloves garlic
2 tbsp chili powder
1 tsp cumin
salt and pepper
recipes.instructions:
Brown the beef in a large pot. Add onion and garlic, cook until soft.
Stir in tomatoes, beans, and spices.
Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.

recipes.name: Avocado Toast
recipes.ingredients:
2 slices sourdough bread
1 ripe avocado
salt and pepper
red pepper flakes
lemon juice
recipes.instructions:
Toast the bread.
Mash avocado with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon.
Spread on toast and top with red pepper flakes.
